17 MCD_GP MCD_GP Medicaid RUG Group CHAR 3 This field contains the Medicaid RUG group calculated for this assessment by the state MDS system.
18 MCD_VR MCD_VR Medicaid RUG Version CHAR 2 This field contains the Medicaid RUG calculator version used for this assessment by the state MDS system.
